rationale: The defining property is 'a non-logical symbol of arity 0', so def:arity is the load-bearing concept and was missing. Added.
notes: def:variable is kept but flagged: a constant symbol is not defined in terms of variables, so this edge is not load-bearing -- it reads as an authorial symbol-introduction chaining (variable -> constant -> function, cf. 0065), the same kind of stray edge as the def:truth-structure mis-attachment on def:theory (0047). Reviewer to decide whether such chaining edges are kept. 'may occur as a term' -> def:term is a candidate. Note a duplicate node def:signature-constant-symbol also exists (dedup candidate).
